item.title: Starlight - Cosplay
item.description: The Boys new season just wrapped up so I had to pull out the ole Starlight Cosplay! The answer is yes, that body suit was insanely difficult to get on. Some say it's still on to this very day...

item.title: 48% of an Oodle of Unmuted Faves

If anyone knows which brilliant mind put this to music let me know in the comments!
https://www.instagram.com/mrzachwoods/
https://www.instagram.com/spaceskits/
https://www.jeffarcuri.com/
Imgurian @DocClawhammer! Upvotes go here: https://imgur.com/gallery/spooky-fall-songs-on-ukulele-here-s-old-scottish-pipe-song-4mUPA4Q
--- For more unmuted faves just click on the #oodles tag

Yippee!! Is one I say a lot

item.title: Returning stolen goods pt 77
item.description: Clockwise. And Some Like It Hot. Latter may not be obscure but I have had to tell (or show it to) basically every friend Ive ever had and Im 40. So. Semi-obscure which is RIDICULOUS cause ohmygod. One of my all time favorites.

item.title: What breed is your dog? He’s a heart rate monitor
item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: 1st post. Some people have their kids, I have my cat:P how it started and how it’s going, and some of the inbetween. 5 years since adopting my little farm cat.
item.description:
Before: Kacchan had so much personality people took notice. A friend showed me this video and said I should adopt him.
Before: His eyes still get Goobery at times. The vet said it wasn’t curable, but decrease in stress since I adopted him has made it much better.
Now! The little toof
HE LOVES BEING OUTSIDE still; he started life that way. I’ve lived many different places since adopting him. Now I have a fenced in yard and he knows how to use the doggy door. He spends 90% of his time out there. He likes catching mice and bringing them to me.
I love how evil he looks in this pic
Him and me :)
Kacchan and his bro silver.
Always by me even in the bath
Before
Now
Awe he was so small
Not even a fraction of the pictures I have of him. So glad we have each other
item.dc:creator: orangecatsplendor

item.title: The 459th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps - OC WEEK!
item.description:
This week, ALL FIVE of my Dumps will contain OC MeeMays and Screenshats! Straight from the Brainal Region of me, PyroDragon Of The Imgurs! Monday, Wednesday and Friday are Pure OC. Tuesday and Thursday are OC edits of other MeeMays. The Edits may be additions of mine, or things I've rewritten to make more legible or fancier.
I am also still promoting an online friend's Twitch Stream and Cat Surgery Fundraiser again @ElbowDeepInPackages (Amazon shipments, not genitals) Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/erosrogziel She will be streaming, but for a few weeks it will be unscheduled because of her work schedule. https://imgur.com/gallery/kZDYAFm The consult appointment was on July 9th, at that alone costed $180. She's up to $479 as of last night, but that still leaves her far short of the expected costs. There will be HUGE additional costs for the procedure itself, over $3500 USD! Ko-FI: https://ko-fi.com/erosrogziel Please give whatever you can to help this kitty!
@GushLikeAFountain
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild *every other* Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral. If you wish to chat, I'm frequently in ElbowDeepInAHorse and PotatoCheesMonk's Discord Servers between the hours of 7pm and 1am GMT-5 during the week, and at unpredictable but frequent times Saturdays and Sundays
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters @DaymanAhAAAAah @SecretHarpy Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #OC #Meme_Dump #Memes #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple #GregFromHR #SteveFromAccounting #DougFromSales
item.dc:creator: PyroDragon
